StringData.String: You have reached the level cap. Upgrade your hero room so you can level up.
It looks like you are running low on available friends. Invite new friends to join you in your legendary adventure.
Strong Warriors are good to shield your hero from the front row. Invite new friends to protect your hero and encourage them to be Warriors.
Agile Rogues act quickly and rain arrows down on the battlefield. Invite your most cunning friends and encourage them to be Rogues.
Powerful Mages can dominate the battlefield with mighty spells. Invite friends and encourage them to be Mages.
Looks like you could use more friends to aid you in your adventure. Invite friends to join Dragon Age Legends today.
When more friends use your hero, you can earn more gold each day. Invite friends to join your legendary adventure to earn more gold.
Just like Ravi had Lukesh and Sendis, you need your best friends by your side. Invite your friends to play Dragon Age Legends today!
Legends is more fun when your friends see your hero's Epic Loot! Invite your friends to play Dragon Age Legends today!
Need more gold to upgrade your castle? More friends means more gold! Invite friends to join Dragon Age Legends today.
Legends is more fun when your friends see your hero's Epic Loot! Invite your friends to play Dragon Age Legends today!
